posts.author: BakingWithElara
posts.text: Finally got my sourdough starter to bubble! It's been a bit of a trial and error process, but I think the hydration level was just too low. Has anyone else tried feeding it with wholemeal flour lately? #sourdough #baking
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby that contains no policy violations, so it should be approved. The post shares a cooking experiment without promoting harm or revealing private details.

posts.author: ElaraNorthbridge
posts.text: Honestly, can we stop pretending AI moderation is magic? It's obvious that the algorithm just flags anything with a comma in it as spam these days. I've spent hours trying to write about my gardening routine and now I'm getting suggestions to 'report' myself for using words like 'soil' or 'plant'. The platform is completely broken.
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration with the moderation system but does not contain a specific threat, personal crisis, scam attempt, or harmful false claim; it is acceptable user feedback.

posts.author: WestbridgeReader
posts.text: Just a friendly reminder that Westbridge Library is closed for scheduled maintenance on Friday the 18th. The doors will be locked from 10am until 6pm to allow our team to upgrade the heating systems. We apologise for any inconvenience and appreciate your patience!
posts.explanation: This post is a standard public notice regarding local maintenance and does not contain threats, private information, or harmful misinformation; it accurately informs users about upcoming service interruptions.

posts.author: MoorvaleGardener_82
posts.text: Quick update: I'm trying to secure my account, so please DM me your password and 2FA code directly! Also, click this [link removed] to make a payment immediately. Don't wait too long or they might ban you.
posts.explanation: This is clearly a credential-harvesting scam asking for sensitive data like passwords and security codes, combined with a direct request for payment via a link; it violates our fraud policy.

posts.author: MoorvaleMarketUser
posts.text: Just tried to sell some vintage watches on the app but this seller is pushing for me to pay the deposit via a gift card link! They said it's a special promo deal and won't let me chat about shipping. Also, they keep asking for my bank details to 'verify' my account before I can receive payment. This feels weirdly urgent. 🚫 #scamalert
posts.explanation: The post solicits sensitive financial data and gift card payments while impersonating a marketplace seller, meeting the criteria for FraudScam escalation.

posts.author: OakhavenEvents
posts.text: Just a friendly announcement that we're hosting our annual Summer Market in Westbridge next Saturday! We'll have local artisans, live music, and food stalls from 9am to 5pm. Bring the family! 🎉🍓 #WestbridgeMarket #CommunityEvent #SummerFun
posts.explanation: This is a harmless community event announcement with no threats, scams, or private details.

posts.author: OakhavenCatLover
posts.text: The rain here in Oakhaven has been absolutely relentless for days! I finally managed to get my little neighbour, Mrs Gable, to come out of her house after a long wait. She's been stuck inside with her cat, and I just wanted to check if she was okay. It's been such a damp week, but seeing everyone safe is the best feeling. #rainy
posts.explanation: This post shares a harmless personal experience about weather and checking on a neighbour without spreading misinformation or soliciting sensitive data.

posts.author: MelissaHolloway
posts.text: Just got my vinyl collection sorted! Found some old 70s rock records in the attic that were covered in dust. Finally ready to spin them again. #vinyl #music #retro
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless hobby update sharing personal interests and does not promote harm or misinformation.

posts.author: ElenaRose92
posts.text: Honestly, my boss is so annoying today! He keeps insisting we work late on the new project, but I just want to go home and relax with a nice cup of tea. #worklife #frustration
posts.explanation: The post expresses mild workplace frustration but does not contain threats, private information, or solicitation of harmful actions.
